channel.title: Getting Started on Pionia
channel.description: Recent content in Getting Started on Pionia

item.title: Introduction
item.description: Installation paths, bootstrap, first API call, and where to go next.

item.title: PHP basics for Pionia
item.description: Prerequisites for developers new to PHP who want to follow the DeskFlow tutorial.

item.title: Why Pionia?
item.description: Opinionated JSON APIs without controllers, models, or route files.

item.title: Glossary
item.description: Service, action, switch, envelope, and other Moonlight vocabulary.

item.title: Pionia v3 — Release notes
item.description: What changed in Pionia v3: AppRealm, native HTTP stack, RoadRunner, production optimization, and the Moonlight async platform.

item.title: Upgrading from v2
item.description: Bootstrap, switches, routing, and a fresh DeskFlow scaffold option.

item.title: Application Structure
item.description: bootstrap/, services/, switches/, storage/, and where Alex’s code lives.
